book.title: Ratata. Lascia cadere la pioggia
book.author: Collective Peacock — Hisako, Kazuko, Yuka, Stefano Giglio

editorial_principle: Each field is a perceptual operator that does not describe reality but actively reorganizes the conditions under which sound, body, language and weather become spatial events. No field is purely symbolic; each is physically operative within the perceptual system.

fields.label: campo_sonoro_urbano_saturo
fields.basho: sound does not originate from the window or the song; it saturates the alley as a full-volume acoustic space in which source and receiver collapse into the same field
fields.kokyu: rhythm is compression-release without transition: silence accumulates until it cannot hold, then breaks into punk-alternative irruption
fields.activation_condition: deafening urban silence + single open window + external auditory witness
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as any auditory residue remains in either environment or body
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses only when both external sound and internal auditory memory reach zero intensity (theoretically impossible state)

residual_state.description: the silence remains active beneath the song as a compressed sub-layer of pressure

fields.textual_anchor_it: per fortuna questo suono rompe un silenzio assordante.

fields.label: campo_corporeo_bolla_elastica
fields.basho: the body is not container but actuator: chewing gum, breath and bubble form a single extended spatial system that crosses the boundary of the window
fields.kokyu: rhythm is torsion: chewing (internal), holding (threshold), release (external expansion), rebound (return without full closure)
fields.activation_condition: nervous mastication + breath retention + involuntary pressure release
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as elastic deformation remains possible in any component of the system
fields.dissolution_rule: even when the bubble collapses, the deformation trace persists as bodily reconfiguration

affects.field-01: the bubble introduces spatial distortion into the acoustic field of the alley
affects.field-03: the body-field becomes the origin of atmospheric perturbation (rain reading shift)

fields.textual_anchor_it: mastica nervosamente un chewing gum, trattiene il respiro, fa una bolla rosa.

fields.label: campo_emotivo_precipitazione
fields.basho: emotion is not internal state but atmospheric collapse: the alley receives feeling as precipitation distributed across surfaces
fields.kokyu: rhythm is non-linear drip sequence: each drop is temporally autonomous, not part of a cumulative flow
fields.activation_condition: presence of unresolved tension + sonic saturation + reflective surfaces (wet asphalt, bubble skin)
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as any stain, wetness, or reflective humidity remains active
fields.dissolution_rule: field cannot fully disappear; it only shifts from liquid to trace state

residual_state.description: the rain continues as memory-density even after meteorological cessation

fields.textual_anchor_it: Gocciola, gocciola, gocciola, la goccia di pioggia cade. Scorrendo e cadendo, diventa una macchia.

fields.label: campo_bilingue_sovrapposto
fields.basho: Italian and Japanese do not translate or alternate; they occupy the same perceptual plane as simultaneous inscriptions of the same event
fields.kokyu: rhythm is parallel, not sequential: two linguistic pulses coexist without synchronization or hierarchy
fields.activation_condition: co-presence of Japanese script + Italian phrasing within the same perceptual frame
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as no language is reduced to explanatory support of the other
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses if one language becomes interpretive hierarchy over the other
fields.textual_anchor_it: ラタタ… Ra ta ta. Il suono non traduce, invade.

fields.label: campo_vicolo_anonimo_risonante
fields.basho: the alley is not background but resonant cavity: all events are acoustically amplified and spatially distorted within it
fields.kokyu: rhythm is threshold-based: waiting pressure → sudden invasion → post-invasion residue
fields.activation_condition: presence of open window + external sound source + reflective wet surface
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as spatial ambiguity between inside and outside remains active
fields.dissolution_rule: field never fully dissolves; it only relocates its resonance geometry

affects.field-02: distorts bubble trajectory into environmental rebound logic

fields.textual_anchor_it: un rumore che proviene da un vicolo di una anonima città del mondo.

system_note.system_behavior: fields operate as coupled perceptual operators; each event (sound, bubble, rain, language) propagates across all other fields as a distributed distortion system rather than discrete narrative action
